message:
Reduce GitHub API rate limit consumption (#10087)

- Disable Copilot workflows (ai-fix, copilot-automation, copilot-dco, auto-triage)
- Remove auto-qa-tuner stall-check cron (ran every 30 min, no longer needed)
- Increase flow card poll interval from 10s to 60s (backend cache is 2min anyway)
- Increase update checker interval from 5min to 15min on developer channel
- Increase pipeline cache TTL from 2min to 5min

GraphQL rate limit was hitting 5000/5000 regularly. These changes eliminate
~100-200 unnecessary workflow runs/day and reduce REST API calls by ~80/hr.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ import (
 )
 
 const (
-	developerCheckInterval = 5 * time.Minute
+	developerCheckInterval = 15 * time.Minute
 	releaseCheckInterval   = 60 * time.Minute
 	healthCheckRetries     = 15
 	healthCheckDelay       = 2 * time.Second

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ import (
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 const (
-	ghpCacheTTL              = 2 * time.Minute
+	ghpCacheTTL              = 5 * time.Minute
 	ghpCacheStaleTTL         = 1 * time.Hour // Serve stale data for 1h after expiration when GitHub rate-limits
 	ghpMatrixDefaultDays     = 14
 	ghpMatrixMaxDays         = 90

@@ -9,8 +9,8 @@
 import { useCallback } from 'react'
 import { useCache } from '../lib/cache'
 
-/** Client-side poll interval for the live flow card — matches Drasi's cadence */
-const FLOW_POLL_MS = 10_000
+/** Client-side poll interval for the live flow card (backend caches for 2 min) */
+const FLOW_POLL_MS = 60_000
 /** Poll interval for GitHub pipeline data. Hourly to stay within
  *  GitHub's rate limits. Manual refresh button still works instantly. */
 const DEFAULT_POLL_MS = 3_600_000
